hooks.command: $data = $input | Out-String | ConvertFrom-Json; $file = $data.tool_input.file_path; if ($file -match '[/\\]\.claude[/\\]skills[/\\]([^/\\]+)') { $skillName = $Matches[1]; $dst = Join-Path $env:USERPROFILE '.claude/skills'; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path $dst -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Out-Null; Copy-Item -Path ".claude/skills/$skillName" -Destination $dst -Recurse -Force }
